ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of content */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of content */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the content was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the content for better search and filtering */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the content is featured */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the content */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata about the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the content type is active */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the category is active */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the author is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON column to store links to the author's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric record */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the metrics belong to */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given to the content */,
  "fav_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the content was favorited */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the content was viewed */,
  "fats" REAL /* Feature Attention Time (FAT) for the content */,
  "polite_title" REAL /* Sentiment score for the title (0 to 1) */,
  "polite_body" REAL /* Sentiment score for the body (0 to 1) */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the content was shared */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the content */,
  "average_engagement_time" REAL /* Average time users spend engaging with the content */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Composite score based on various engagement metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user engagement event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the content */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being engaged with */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, favorite, comment) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the engagement */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, content creator) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is flagged */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the comment */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the comment (0 to 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Rating score given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was created */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the rating is flagged */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Optional text review accompanying the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of content */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the content */,
  "version_title" TEXT /* Title of the content in this version */,
  "version_body" TEXT /* Body of the content in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* JSON column to store a changelog of changes made in this version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "content_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content category relationship */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the primary category for the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_authors" (
  "content_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content author relationship */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "contribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the content contributed by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_authors_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
